mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_permission_request (user_id, permission_code, description, status, requested_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{permissionCode}, #{description}, 'PENDING', #{requestedBy})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, r.permission_code, p.display_name AS permission_name, r.description, r.status, r.requested_by, ru.name AS requested_by_name, r.decided_by, r.decided_at, r.created_at FROM admin_permission_request r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN admin_permission_policy p ON p.permission_code = r.permission_code LEFT JOIN users ru ON ru.id = r.requested_by WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_permission_request SET status = #{status}, decided_by = #{decidedBy}, decided_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
